title: #2.21: Ones and zeros and random numbers
description: Hey nerds! It's computer time! Bamse is here to school us all on the science of computers! And numbers! Mark has yet another fit of rage over chemophobia, and Robin's prepared a quiz about another litterary scientist. How many points did you get? Holy macaroni! We've got 15% on everything! From the 5th - 9th of April with coupon code 15APRIL19. Use it at checkout -
